name: Jyostna Seelam
bio: As Founder and Chapter Chair, Jyostna establishes the strategic vision, governance, and long-term roadmap for ACM Richmond. She leads the executive committee in cultivating a thriving regional technology ecosystem and serves as the principal emissary to industry executives, academic institutions, and professional societies.

name: Abdul Rasheed Shaik
bio: As Vice Chair, Rasheed supports chapter-wide strategy and operations while overseeing execution across all director portfolios. He represents ACM Richmond in industry and academic engagements, ensures smooth coordination across teams, and provides leadership continuity to drive impactful initiatives.

name: Mr Khadarvali Shaik
bio: As Membership Chair, Khadarvali leads efforts to grow and retain a vibrant ACM Richmond community. He develops outreach strategies to attract professionals, academics, and students, fosters meaningful engagement across member segments, and works to ensure every member finds lasting value in their ACM affiliation.

name: Ankita Banerjee
bio: As Treasurer, Ankita manages chapter finances and compliance, maintains records, and coordinates communication to ensure we stay aligned with ACM standards. We are dedicated to building an inclusive computing community that connects professionals, researchers, students, and technology enthusiasts through learning, collaboration, and innovation. Together, we create opportunities to grow, share knowledge, and make a lasting impact on the technology ecosystem.

name: Dipanjan Sen
bio: Secretary coordinating chapter communications and records.

name: Open Position
bio: Open role: maintain the ACM Richmond online presence.
